case_title: FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE VS. NADA RAFEH et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-23-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER VACATING SANCTIONS ISSUED ON DECEMBER 23, 2003
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-16-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-23-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT RAFEH, NADA AN IND DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-16-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-17-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-31-2003

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JAY W. SMITH, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-23-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-07-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY DEBORAH NEVILLE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
